rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Appoint A Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, September 11, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFFS DAVID JARAMILLO, et al's Motion To Appoint A Receiver. GRANTED per CCP 564(b)(9). A receiver shall be appointed and the receiver shall evaluate the Property to provide an accurate estimate of the completion date based on defendant's management/efforts/and progress and based on Defendant's current financial investment into the property. Receiver shall also indicate if the completion may be accomplished faster based on additional resources or better management. Based on Receiver's report the Court shall determine whether the Property shall be marketed for sale. Receiver shall provide the report within 1 month of appointment. Each side may file briefs (not to exceed 5 pages) addressing whether based on the report the Property shall be sold. Briefs must be filed within 10 days of filing of the Receiver's report. The hearing date shall be set for 2 weeks after the filing of the briefs and shall be indicated on the briefs. Additionally, based on Defendant's offer, Defendant shall: (1) pay rent differential within 5 days of receipt of the demand for rent starting August 1, 2017 and though the months of September. The rent differential shall thereafter be tendered on the first day of each month starting October 1, 2017; and (2) rooms in residential hotels shall be provided by Defendant to those Plaintiffs who require a room within 5 days of receipt of information from Plaintiffs. The rooms shall be comparable to the rooms in Bristol Hotel upon completion of the project. The parties shall meet and confer re: receiver, payment for receiver services, counsel for receiver, if necessary, etc. Parties to prepare proposed order(s) and present it to the Court at the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Alexander Garcias Further Responses To Defendant Victor Makras Special Interrogatories Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Daniel Berko In Support; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, September 11, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT G. MAKRAS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Alexander Garcias Further Responses To Defendant Victor Makras Special Interrogatories Set One. Continued to November 16, 2017 for status report. Discovery referee was appointed per July 19, 2017 order and August 25, 2017 ruling. Defendant to prepare and present for execution at the time of the hearing an order continuing the motion and appointing Sigrid Irias as referee. All outstanding discovery motions to be submitted as referee. Defendant was the moving and the prevailing party on the motion to appoint the referee. Defendant to advance referee fees and to collect ½ of the fees from Plaintiff to be paid to Defendant within 20 days of receipt of paid invoice. August 25, 2017 discovery motion shall also be continued to status report to November 16, 2017. =(501/REQ)
